# MAG Electric

> Licensed residential and commercial electrician serving Santa Maria, San Luis Obispo County, Santa Barbara County, and the Central Valley of California. Owner Matthew Gil — CA CSLB License #1115849. Specializing in electrical panel upgrades, EV charger installation, solar panel wiring, whole home rewires, SPAN smart panel installs, and commercial electrical work.

## Core pages

- [MAG Electric Home](https://magelectric.net/): Licensed electrician in Santa Maria CA. Overview of services (panel upgrades, EV chargers, solar wiring, commercial electrical, whole home rewires, SPAN smart panels), service area, project gallery, and direct contact.
- [Panel Upgrades](https://magelectric.net/panel-upgrades): Dedicated landing page for 200-amp electrical panel upgrades — code-compliant service upgrades, subpanel installations, and electrical safety inspections.
- [Commercial Electrical](https://magelectric.net/commercial): Commercial electrical work for office buildings, retail spaces, gas stations and warehouses — permitted commercial electrical on time and to code.
- [Electrician Sales Playbook](https://magelectric.net/playbook.html): Sales and operations playbook for electrical contractors — internal reference and example of MAG Electric's approach to business operations.

## Services offered

- **SPAN Smart Panel Installation** — Authorized SPAN installer. Smart electrical panels with circuit-level monitoring, remote control, and solar/battery integration.
- **Whole Home Rewire** — Complete residential rewiring including aluminum wiring replacement, updated to current NEC code.
- **Electrical Panel Upgrade** — 200-amp service upgrades, subpanel installations, electrical safety inspections.
- **EV Charger Installation** — Level 2 home EV charging station installation for Tesla, Ford, GM, Rivian and all electric vehicle makes. Permit pulled and inspection passed.
- **Solar Panel Electrical Wiring** — Electrical wiring and interconnection for solar panel systems including Enphase microinverter and grid-tie systems.
- **Kitchen and Bathroom Electrical Remodel** — New circuits, GFCI protection, under-cabinet lighting and appliance hookups.
- **Lighting and Smart Home Installation** — Recessed lighting, ceiling fans, dimmer systems, smart switches, exterior lighting.
- **ADU and New Construction Electrical** — Full electrical for accessory dwelling units, additions, and new builds from rough-in to final inspection.
- **Commercial Electrical** — Office buildings, retail spaces, gas stations, warehouses — permitted commercial work.
- **Electrical Repairs and Troubleshooting** — Dead outlets, tripping breakers, code violations and electrical problems diagnosed and resolved.

## Service area

Santa Maria, Lompoc, Santa Barbara, San Luis Obispo, Paso Robles, Atascadero, Bakersfield. San Luis Obispo County, Santa Barbara County, and the Central Valley of California.

## About

MAG Electric is a fully licensed, bonded and insured electrical contractor in Santa Maria, California. Owner Matthew Gil leads every project from estimate to final inspection. The company holds California CSLB License #1115849 and serves residential and commercial customers across SLO County, Santa Barbara County, and the Central Valley.
